params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with write and read functionalities. It has an input data line (16 bits), a write enable signal (we), a read enable signal (re), and an output data line (16 bits). When the write enable signal is low, the input data should be stored in the DRAM cell; when the read enable signal is low, the stored data should be output on the data line.
